response.justification: Candidate is a senior full-stack developer with strong TypeScript/Node.js/DLang experience but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role. No Japanese language proficiency is mentioned (a hard requirement), C experience is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no demonstrated experience with Linux kernel modification, embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, or security technologies like MACsec/802.1X.
strengths: Long track record as a senior/staff engineer with strong software craftsmanship and TDD discipline
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic
Comfortable picking up new languages and tools across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded contexts
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (role requires native-level Japanese)
No Linux kernel source modification, embedded firmware, or LAN-switch/network security experience
C is not a current core skill; recent work is overwhelmingly TypeScript/Node.js and web stacks

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking/security or Linux kernel modification experience
Minimal and dated C programming experience
